ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user stream */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user, including the domain */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current state of the user (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "last_active_ts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last active event for the user */,
  "last_federation_update_ts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last federation update for the user */,
  "last_user_sync_ts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user synchronization event */,
  "status_msg" TEXT /* User-defined status message */,
  "currently_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is currently active */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the user's device */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "login_method" TEXT /* Method used by the user to log in */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status message */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "status_text" TEXT /* The text of the status message */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* The type of status message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status message was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status message was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "server_info" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* The name of the server */,
  "server_type" TEXT /* The type of server */,
  "last_sync_ts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last synchronization event for the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_server_sync" (
  "sync_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the synchronization event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the server */,
  "sync_ts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the synchronization event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sync_id")
)
